Name: Average duration from the start of the scientific review process to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total waiting time to the SW-Reviewer Agreed in the longest process variant
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'case:variant'}"

Name: Total time for SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases ending with SW-EIC Major Revision

Name: Total time since the SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper and SW-Reviewer Agreed are performed

Name: Time to SW-Reviewer Agreed since the Plagiarism Originality Report Completed

Name: Ratio of the average time to SW-Reviewer Agreed to the average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision

Name: Minimum time until SW-Reviewer Agreed is performed in any case

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: SW-Reviewer Agreed Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time until SW-Reviewer Agreed is performed per manuscript

Name: Total time to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by the number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers events preceding it

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by case variant

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the subsequent SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
